infoPlist.NSCalendarsFullAccessUsageDescription: Kavi accesses your calendars only when you ask it to read events or create, update, or delete a calendar entry on your behalf.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Kavi uses the microphone only for voice input, voice notes, and audio captured during a user-requested recording.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Kavi uses the camera only when you capture an image or short video clip for a conversation or tool action.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Kavi accesses your photo library only when you choose images to attach to a conversation or use a photo-aware tool.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Kavi uses your location only when you ask the assistant to open maps or run a location-aware action.
infoPlist.NSContactsUsageDescription: Kavi accesses contacts only for actions you request, such as picking a contact or an explicitly approved contact search, view, edit, create, or share action.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsUsageDescription: Kavi accesses your calendar only when you ask the assistant to view events or create a calendar entry.

plugins.contactsPermission: Kavi accesses contacts only for actions you request, such as picking a contact or an explicitly approved contact search, view, edit, create, or share action.

plugins.microphonePermission: Kavi uses the microphone only for voice input, voice notes, and audio captured during a user-requested recording.
